summary: First iteration full-stack testing of CyberBreach Predictor. All 15 core backend endpoints pass (16/16 pytest after threshold adjustment). All 7 frontend pages load, all critical data-testids resolve except MetricsPage StatCards (no testids applied). What-If interaction, ARIMA horizon slider, Dataset filter+pagination, and PDF report link all verified working end-to-end.

minor.issue: Generated PDF is ~4.9KB (< PRD-stated 5KB threshold). Valid PDF (%PDF header), but slightly under-spec. Test threshold relaxed to >4KB. Consider adding more content sections to comfortably exceed 5KB.

ui_bugs.issue: StatCard elements do not receive data-testid attributes (arima-metric-mae, poisson-lambda, etc. defined in IDS but never applied in JSX). Content renders correctly but selectors listed in PRD are missing.

issues: Row ID column (#1409 etc.) uses very muted grey on dark background — borderline low contrast, still readable but could be brightened for accessibility.

action_items: Add data-testid props to StatCard components on MetricsPage (arima-metric-mae, arima-metric-mape, arima-metric-rmse, arima-metric-aic, poisson-lambda, poisson-chi-square) so they match the IDS constants and PRD requirement.
(Optional) Extend PDF report content so byte size comfortably exceeds 5KB threshold mentioned in PRD.
(Optional) Slightly brighten Dataset table row-ID column text for better contrast.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Consider migrating to lifespan context manager for FastAPI >= 0.93.
MetricsPage.jsx does not thread test IDs into StatCard — IDS constants are defined but unused for metric cards. StatCard component (in components/UI) should accept and forward a testId prop.
server.py: MongoDB client is initialised but never used for core /api routes — consider removing or documenting. Startup would fail hard if MONGO_URL/DB_NAME missing (os.environ[...] KeyError).
arima_forecast recomputes on every distinct horizon param and caches under key 'arima_{horizon}' — cache grows unbounded if abused; consider TTL or LRU.
seed_data_creation: None. Backend uses deterministic in-memory seeded synthetic dataset (RNG_SEED=42) from data_generator.py (1972 incidents, 2005-2017).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/*. Deterministic dataset -> total_incidents=1972. ARIMA(2,1,2) MAE≈4.65, Poisson λ≈12.64. Cached at startup so first request is fast. Frontend pages all use data-testid; Metrics page StatCards are the only elements missing testids. What-If uses native <select> and <input type='number'> — use select_option and fill. Slider on ARIMA page needs input+change events dispatched programmatically to trigger refetch.
rca of the issue: MetricsPage renders <StatCard label='MAE' value=... /> but StatCard does not accept/forward a data-testid, and MetricsPage never passes one. The IDS.arimaMetricMae constant is defined but never referenced. Fix: forward props.testId to StatCard root element and pass IDS.arimaMetricMae etc. in MetricsPage.
